subcodes.first_line: O seeker of the Beauty of the All-Glorious! Rumi hath said: In Samarkand sugar is found, yet its sweetness is discovered in Bukhara [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب جمال ذی الجلال ملای رومی گفته در سمرقند است قند اما لبش از بخارا یافت
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Jabulqa and Jabarsa
